title: gilia tricolor subsp. diffusa
intro: Gilia tricolor subsp. diffusa, also known as the Mexican Gilia, is a perennial plant native to Mexico, characterized by its bright blue, red, and yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Gilia tricolor subsp. diffusa include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. Gilia tricolor subsp. diffusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
